## Checklist

- [ ] No placeholder or skeleton files introduced
- [ ] No new top-level directories without justification
- [ ] No speculative abstractions or "future-use" code
- [ ] Any TODO/FIXME comments include author, date, and issue reference
- [ ] Stale code or docs removed if applicable
- [ ] LLM-generated PRs with >5 new files include per-file justification
